overall.description: A nighttime walk through the gas-lit historic streets of Saint Denis in Red Dead Redemption 2. The camera moves along wet cobblestone streets past balconied buildings, encountering a horse rider and a carriage before arriving at a grand neoclassical building.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street corner with gas lamps

events.description: camera begins walking forward along the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking away from the street corner along the narrow cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: standing by the building wall, raising hand in a gesture

entered.detail: three-story wooden building with balcony and lit windows
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars
cast iron gas lamp glowing warm orange

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark corner of a historic district at night. An NPC stands by a wooden building on the right, raising their hand as the camera begins walking forward along the narrow cobblestone street, passing a wooden utility pole and gas lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks

events.description: horse and rider pass by from right to left across the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past historic storefronts and tram tracks

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse trotting past from right to left

entered.detail: three-story building with balcony and 'HINCHLIFFE'S BOOKSELLERS' signage
metal tram rails embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wider commercial street with tram tracks, passing Hinchliffe's Bookstore on the left. A rider on a white horse crosses the street from right to left. The street is lined with historic buildings illuminated by warm gaslight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide avenue leading to neoclassical plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide avenue toward the large building at the end of the street

entered.detail: large stone building with tall columns and pediment, illuminated entrance
wooden cart parked on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wide avenue with the grand neoclassical building dominating the view ahead. The camera continues forward along the tram tracks, passing a parked wooden wagon, as the impressive columned facade grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza in front of neoclassical bank building

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by from right to left in front of the building

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance through the wrought iron gates

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with lantern moving past the entrance

entered.detail: black iron fence with stone pillars surrounding the building
lit lanterns flanking the main entrance doorway
open iron gates leading to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the plaza in front of the grand neoclassical building, passing through the wrought iron fence. A horse-drawn carriage moves across the scene from right to left. The camera approaches the illuminated entrance with its tall columns and glowing lanterns, ending at the building's front steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, dimly lit historic alleyway into a grand, illuminated urban plaza. It begins on a dark corner where a figure gestures from beside a wooden building as the camera advances past a gas lamp and utility pole. As the path widens into a commercial street, the camera glides along tram tracks past Hinchliffe's Bookstore while a rider on a white horse crosses the warm, gas-lit thoroughfare. The scene then opens into a broad avenue, moving past a parked wooden wagon as a massive neoclassical building with a columned facade gradually dominates the horizon. Finally, the camera passes through a wrought iron fence and moves past a horse-drawn carriage to arrive at the glowing lanterns and front steps of the imposing structure.
